title: Nyíregyháza、Szabolcs-Szatmár-Bereg — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Nyíregyháza、Szabolcs-Szatmár-Beregの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

NyíregyházaはSzabolcs-Szatmár-Beregにある人口116,554の都市です。The largest city in northeastern Hungary, a regional economic and cultural center known for its Sóstó thermal baths and the Nyíregyháza Zoo.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
